restaurants.name: Riddle & Finns – Brighton Seafront
highlights: Stylish but relaxed seaside setting right on the seafront
great for seafood lovers and groups
must_try_dishes: Whole grilled lobster with herb butter
seafood platter of oysters, mussels, crab
